The PR changes `src/commands/doctor-state-integrity.test.ts` so the symlinked state-dir doctor test uses a directory-symlink capability probe and Windows junctions instead of skipping all Windows runs.

PR surface: Tests +15. Total +15 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the coverage gap: current main source shows the relevant symlink regression test is skipped on every Windows run. No runtime user bug reproduction is needed because this PR is test-only.
